understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by moving/arranging all selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with '+' in the semantic grid is simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece, producing a WIN; doing this across all levels completes the game run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT) attempt to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in that direction; if blocked by a wall/boundary or an immovable object the piece does not move. Some adjacent objects (blocks) can be pushed if they are directly in the movement direction and the space beyond them allows the push, causing both the selected piece and the pushed object to shift. Levels may contain multiple selectable pieces; control can be switched using CLICK on the exact pixel/grid coordinate of another selectable. Walls generally prevent movement/pushing through them, though the movement.*_blocked indicators are only hints and an action may still succeed or fail depending on actual interactions.
